Package recoder.io

Class PathList

java.lang.Object
recoder.io.PathList
public class PathList extends Object
This class describes a list of search paths. Search paths may contain a mixture of directories, logical directories (e.g. "."), and archive files (e.g. ".jar", ".zip").

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PathList()
    creates a new empty path list
    PathList(String pathStr)
    creates a path list from the given path string
    PathList(String[] paths)
    creates a path list from the given strings.

    Description

    adds the given paths to the list.

    protected Set
    getContents(File directory)
    Returns a set of file names in the given directory.
    String
    getRelativeName(String absoluteFilename)
    Returns a relative name of the given absolute file name removing a directory path prefix if the prefix occurs in this path list.
    String

    Returns the string representation of the path list.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • PathList

      public PathList()
      creates a new empty path list

    • PathList

      public PathList(String pathStr)
      creates a path list from the given path string
      Parameters:
      pathStr - a single path string, e.g. the content of CLASSPATH

    • PathList

      public PathList(String[] paths)
      creates a path list from the given strings. The single strings are interpreted as path strings.
      Parameters:
      paths - the array of path strings to be added

  • Method Details

    • flushCaches

      public void flushCaches()
      Empties the caches of this service.
      Since:
      0.72

    • add

      public int add(String pathStr)
      adds the given paths to the list.
      Parameters:
      pathStr - the string containing the paths
      Returns:
      the number of paths added from the path string

    • getContents

      protected Set getContents(File directory)
      Returns a set of file names in the given directory.

    • find

      public DataLocation find(String relativeName)
      Looks for the file with the given relative file name in the path list and returns the according location object. If no such file can be found within the paths, the method returns null.
      Parameters:
      relativeName - the relative name of the file
      Returns:
      the location object or null if the file could not be found.

    • getRelativeName

      public String getRelativeName(String absoluteFilename)
      Returns a relative name of the given absolute file name removing a directory path prefix if the prefix occurs in this path list. If the filename is a directory path that is already in this path list, a "." is returned. In any other case, the absolute file name is passed through.
      Parameters:
      absoluteFilename - an absolute file name.
      Returns:
      a name for this file, possibly relative to this search path.

    • findAll

      public DataLocation[] findAll(String relativeName)
      Looks for files with the given relative file name in the path list and returns an array containing the full path names of each match. If no file could be located, this method returns an empty array.
      Parameters:
      relativeName - the relative name of the file
      Returns:
      an array containing the full paths of all matching files

    • findAll

      public DataLocation[] findAll(FilenameFilter filter)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of the path list.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      the concatenated pathstring.
